narrative:
Cass Township has 1,106 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
